name: Astral-Lugia (Tidal Sovereign)
description: The astral guardian of the deep ocean and cosmic current. A single stroke of its glowing wings can calm or summon 40-day tempest storms.
originLore: Formed in the deepest oceanic trenches illuminated by fallen stellar shards. Astral-Lugia preserves equilibrium across terrestrial and cosmic waters.

lore.celestialConcordance: Astral-Lugia sings harmonic sea hymns that pacify chaotic gravitational waves between planet systems.

quantumResonators.name: Aeroblast (Astral)
quantumResonators.description: Fires a vortex of pressurized cosmic water and psychic light.

quantumResonators.name: Subsurface Harmony
quantumResonators.description: Emits a pulse that completely restores defective energy structures and shields.
